---
name: Data correction
about: Report incorrect or missing data (Pokémon, recipes, raids, moves, etc.)
title: "[DATA] "
labels: data
assignees: ""
---

## What data is incorrect or missing?

Describe the issue clearly. Include the Pokémon name, recipe, move, or any relevant identifier.

## Current data (if applicable)

What does the tool currently show?

## Correct data

What should it show instead?

## Source

**Required.** Cite where this data comes from:

- [ ] PokéAPI (pokeapi.co)
- [ ] Serebii (serebii.net)
- [ ] Bulbapedia (bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net)
- [ ] In-game verification (describe below)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

Source URL or description:

## Additional context

Any other context that would help verify the correction.
